name: NOOP
subtitle: Offline WHOOP companion — your strap, your data, your device.
description:
NOOP pairs directly with your WHOOP 4 or 5 strap over Bluetooth, stores everything in a local SQLite database, and computes recovery, strain, HRV and sleep entirely on-device. No WHOOP account. No cloud. No subscription. Import your existing WHOOP CSV or Apple Health export to bring your full history in one shot.

NOOP is an independent, unofficial, non-commercial interoperability project. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to WHOOP, Inc. Not a medical device — every derived metric is an approximation.

apps.name: NOOP
apps.subtitle: Offline WHOOP companion. No cloud, no account.
apps.localizedDescription:
NOOP pairs directly with your WHOOP 4 or 5 strap over Bluetooth and computes recovery, strain, HRV and sleep entirely on your iPhone — no WHOOP account, no cloud, no subscription.

Features:
• Live heart rate and R-R interval stream from the strap
• On-device recovery, strain and sleep scoring
• HRV haptic breathing biofeedback (Breathe screen)
• Silent haptic HIIT timer (Intervals screen)
• Import WHOOP CSV export or Apple Health export
• Full history: sleep hypnograms, workout detail, trends, correlations
• Optional AI Coach (bring your own API key — the only feature that ever uses the network)
• Everything else is 100% offline

NOOP is an independent, unofficial, non-commercial interoperability project. Not affiliated with WHOOP, Inc. Not a medical device.

versions.localizedDescription: Fixed (iPhone): action buttons that wrapped mid-word on narrow screens — the Live screen's Re-scan / Buzz strap / Disconnect row and the Backup Export / Import / Export CSV row now keep each label on one line.

Patch release. Skin temperature unblocked on iPhone — strap skin temp was read on the wrong scale, making every real night look impossibly cold. Now matches Android and macOS. Export and layout fixes.
Skin temperature unblocked on Mac and iOS. Export fixes.
Browse past nights: Sleep screen now has back/forward arrows to step through every recorded night. Smarter AI Coach sees on-device recovery/strain/sleep. Workout times and battery shown.

privacy.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: NOOP connects directly to your WHOOP strap over Bluetooth to read heart rate, R-R intervals, battery, and sensor data locally on your iPhone. Nothing leaves your device.
